purpose: Pre-register the release claims before public wording or publish action.

claims.public_wording_allowed: Heal Sentinel has a local v0 build with CLI, analyzer, public demo, MCP wrapper, Action wrapper, Skill manifest, and doctrine catalog.
Heal Sentinel separates obvious wound diffs from clean and hard-negative fixtures in the local suite.
Skybridge admission has been observed locally; publish approval is a separate claim.
A strict app-specific header contract exists for /heal-sentinel/**; hosted-origin proof is still required before public-ready wording.
missing_receipts: security_header_probe against deployed Firebase or preview channel

claims.public_wording_allowed: The public page exposes both control-level and result-level proof surfaces for browser verification.
The /heal-sentinel/ route has an explicit release string contract; no cron is scheduled because this is a static manual-release surface.
Heal Sentinel has a product route/watch contract and the wider substrate watcher heartbeat scan was fresh on the release packet.
Claims are locked to receipt-backed wording; public-ready remains false until every required release receipt is green.
Not public-ready. CEO release approval and hosted-origin security proof are still required.
